title: BMap
description: BMap generates a map showing crowded areas in real-time, helping users identify popular spots in urban environments.

title: AirWatch
description: AirWatch is a map that displays air humidity levels across various regions, providing real-time environmental data.

title: MemeGenerator
description: MemeGenerator is a Go-based application that creates memes by allowing users to add custom text to image templates.

title: ShadersLauncher
description: ShadersLauncher is a tool for MCPE players to easily select and apply different shaders to enhance the game's visuals.

title: VeganGrove
description: VeganGrove is a frontend website created for TSA, offering information on vegan products, recipes, and lifestyle.

title: InformatikInc
description: Informatik is a website which was made for cloud consulting. It is mainly a frontend website to showcase there services and business purpose.

title: HumidMapper
description: HumidMapper is a web application for TSA which showcases soil humidity data through via a map interface, providing insights into environmental conditions.

title: ShoStrings
description: This is a blogging website i made for my friend. It is a simple blogging website where you can create, edit and delete your own posts.
